name: cognitive-cycle
description: Harnessed P1-P4 cognitive-cycle skills, packet contracts, and structural validators for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Cognitive Cycle packages P1 Attend, P2 Inquire, P3 Judge, P4 Decide, same-phase integration roles, durable packet contracts, curriculum-primed discipline, semantic review templates, and structural validation scripts for disciplined Codex agent cognition.
defaultPrompt: Use $ep-cognitive-cycle to run a governed P1-P4 review.
Use $ep-p1-attend to characterize the evidence first.
Use $ep-p3-judge to assess whether the packet set is sufficient before P4.
